name: ActiveCampaign
description: Monitor ActiveCampaign marketing automation for contact list access and campaign compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ActiveCampaign
2. Go to Settings → Developer → API Access
3. Copy your API URL and API Key
4. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: API URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your ActiveCampaign API URL. Found in Settings → Developer → API Access (e.g. https://myaccount.api-us1.com)

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in ActiveCampaign Settings → Developer → API Access

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews ActiveCampaign users with access to marketing automation

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies ActiveCampaign automations are running for campaign delivery
